_comment: Single source of truth for every flower PRODUCT shown on the Home page, the Flowers shop, and the Flower Detail page. Edit this file only — flowers.js, flower-detail.js and main.js all read from it. To swap a photo for a real one, just change the 'image' URL; nothing else needs to change.

flowers.name: Sunny Days Bouquet
flowers.description: Crochet sunflowers, white roses, and orange blossoms wrapped in sage paper.
flowers.meaning: Sunflowers stand for warmth, loyalty, and pure happiness.

flowers.name: Sunny Snack Bouquet (Blue)
flowers.description: Yarn sunflowers and blue roses paired with Koala's March, Pepero, and other treats.
flowers.meaning: A cozy mix of warmth and sweetness to brighten someone's day.

flowers.name: Sunny Snack Bouquet (Blush)
flowers.description: A cozy, handcrafted mix of dusty pink sunflowers, white roses, and sweet strawberry treats wrapped in soft rose paper. A beautiful gift of gentle warmth.
flowers.meaning: Dusty pink sunflowers symbolize gratitude and gentle warmth, while white roses represent pure affection, making this a sweet gesture of comfort and care.

flowers.name: Winter White Tulips
flowers.description: White tulips with tiny blue forget-me-not accents.
flowers.meaning: White tulips symbolize forgiveness and pure love.

flowers.name: Rose Bundle Bouquet
flowers.description: A round cluster of coral and pink roses with white accent flowers.
flowers.meaning: Roses in warm tones express hearfelt love and gratitiude.

flowers.name: Orange Blossom Calla Bouquet
flowers.description: White calla lilies, a lavender rose, and orange blossoms in cream paper.
flowers.meaning: A cheerful mix symbolizing warmth, creativity, and grace.

flowers.name: Snowdrop Bouquet
flowers.description: A full ubnch of small white blooms on a lace-wrapped stem.
flowers.meaning: simple white flowers symbolizing ourity and sweetness.

flowers.name: Good Things Bouquet
flowers.description: Coral tulip and soft blossoms wrapped in clear cellophane.
flowers.meaning: A bright bouquet to celebrate good things happening every day.

flowers.name: Rainbow Garden Bouquet
flowers.description: A colorful mix of daisies, lily of the valley, and wildflowers on a lace wrap.
flowers.meaning: A vibrant mix symbolizing joy, variety, and celebration.

flowers.name: Cream Lily Bouquet
flowers.description: Cream liliies with orange blossoms and a single blue bud accent.
flowers.meaning: Lillies represent purity and renewed hope.

flowers.name: Simply Pink Tulips
flowers.description: Three pink corchet tulips, simple and sweet.
flowers.meaning: Pink tulips symbolize caring and affection.

flowers.name: Blue Lily Bouquet
flowers.description: White lilies, blue rose, and bluebell tied with natural twine.
flowers.meaning: A calming mix symbolizing peae and devotion.

flowers.name: Prosperity Blooom Box
flowers.description: A festive red and gold arragement in a lucky box for celebrations.
flowers.meaning: Red and gold flowers sybmolize presperity, luck, and joy.

flowers.name: Autumn Tulip Bouquet
flowers.description: Golden and white tulips with rustic orange accent blooms.
flowers.meaning: RWarm autumn colors symbolize cheer and gratitude.

flowers.name: Poweder Blue lily Bouquet
flowers.description: Dreamy powder-blue lilies paired with white bell flowers.
flowers.meaning: A calm, freamy bouquet symbolizing serenity.

flowers.name: Pastel Garden Bouquet
flowers.description: A pastel mix of saisies, peonies, and calla lilies in soft wrapping.
flowers.meaning: A cheerful mix symbolizing happiness and frinedship.

flowers.name: Sweetlove Sunlflower Bouquet
flowers.description: A large sunfower with yeloow tulips, white roses, and daisies in kraft wrap.
flowers.meaning: Sunflowers symbolize adoration and lasting happinesss.

flowers.name: Lemon Rose Bouquet
flowers.description: Soft lemon-yellow roses with small white daisy accents.
flowers.meaning: Yellow roses symbolize friendship and joy.

flowers.name: Classic Red Roses
flowers.description: A timeless bundle of red crochet roses with leafy green.
flowers.meaning: Red roses symbolize deep love and passion.

flowers.name: Lilizc Dream Bouquet
flowers.description: A lilac lily centerpiece with cream roses and purple tulips.
flowers.meaning: Purple flowers symbolize elegance and enchantment.

flowers.name: Noir Blossom Bouquet
flowers.description: Blush pink blooms set against a dramatic black wrap.
flowers.meaning: A bold, elegant bouquet symbolizing quiet confidence.

flowers.name: Golden Bicotry Bouquet
flowers.description: A bold sunflower centerplece with golden roses and white daisies.
flowers.meaning: Sunflowers symbolize achievement, pride, and good fortune.

flowers.name: Iridescent Garden Bouquet
flowers.description: Pink roses, tulips, daisies, and lily of the valley in a rustic wrap.
flowers.meaning: A gentle mix of flowers symbolizing joy and new beginnings.

flowers.name: Pink Carnation Bouquet
flowers.description: Soft pink carnations and white daisies with a vintage paper wrap.
flowers.meaning: DCarnations represent love and lasting affection.

flowers.name: Rose Beautiful Bouquet
flowers.description: Blush roses and red berry accents wrapped in kraft paper.
flowers.meaning: Roses express romance, red berries add a touch of vitality.

flowers.name: Golden Hour Bouquet
flowers.description: Mustard roses, a white daisy, and a brown pom in earthy wrapping.
flowers.meaning: Warm autumn tones symbolizing comfort and coziness.

flowers.name: Lavender Calla Bouquet
flowers.description: Calla lilies, tulips, and daisies in soft purple and white tones.
flowers.meaning: Lavender represents tranquility and serenity. Purple flowers represent elegance and admiration.

flowers.name: Spring Tulip Bouquet
flowers.description: Cheerful yellow and white crochet tulips with a soft ribbon bow.
flowers.meaning: Tylips symbolize new beginnings and cheerful love.
